aleabitoreddit.recent_shift: 近期市场回调中，作者维持对光子学与机器人产业链的看多观点，并认为这是行业长期趋势的短期波动，而非结构性逆转。
representative_quotes: For robotics companies, I have a favorable view on Unitree and Agility Robotics, two humanoid players. And I have largest concentration in Agility Robotics, since I personally prefer US humanoid players.
I've been hammering home rare earths for the longest time, that the US isn't doing enough to subsidize or scale this industry.
GS Research's ~9-10x $154B optical TAM in 2028 and near $0 -> $91B CPO TAM in just 2 1/2 years. Don't just magically disappear from a month of trading volatility.

unusual_whales.recent_shift: 账户转向更悲观的基调，强调AI泡沫、美联储加息预期和消费者信心下降。
representative_quotes: The AI boom in global stock markets has become an unsustainable bubble

康宁 $GLW 自跟英伟达合作扩产10倍，而康宁股价只涨了25%没翻倍，只能说明市场里的傻瓜太多了
